title: ServerInfo opaque state fields need value interpretation
description: client.rs: ServerInfo fields debug_state, boot_state, lifecycle_state, and nvm_state are all u32 with no documentation. A user calling client.info() gets numbers with no way to interpret them without reading wolfHSM C headers. Add doc comments pointing to the wolfHSM C enums or header that defines the valid values for each state field, or at minimum note which header contains the definitions. This is the first thing a user will look at when debugging a server problem at 2am.
